description: Screens household eligibility for Medicaid, ACA marketplace plans, and CHIP in a cascade.

metadata.label: Household Data Collection
metadata.description: Collect household size, income, state of residence, and dependents under 19.

metadata.label: Medicaid Eligible?
metadata.description: Check if household income is below 138% FPL for Medicaid expansion states.

metadata.label: Medicaid Enrollment
metadata.description: Prepare Medicaid application with household data.

params.llm_prompt: Prepare a Medicaid enrollment summary for a household at {income_fpl_percent}% FPL.

metadata.label: ACA Subsidy Eligible?
metadata.description: Check if income is between 138-400% FPL for ACA marketplace subsidies.

metadata.label: ACA Marketplace Enrollment
metadata.description: Guide through ACA marketplace plan selection with subsidy estimation.

params.llm_prompt: Estimate ACA subsidy for a household at {income_fpl_percent}% FPL.

metadata.label: CHIP Eligible Children?
metadata.description: Check if there are dependents under 19 who may qualify for CHIP.

metadata.label: CHIP Enrollment
metadata.description: Prepare CHIP application for eligible children.

metadata.label: No Program Match
metadata.description: Document that no government program matches. Flag for community resources.

metadata.label: Benefits Counselor Review
metadata.description: Hand off enrollment package to a benefits counselor for submission.
